violations.text: A dead mouse was observed on a glue trap in the back storage area. Dead rodents must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the freezer area have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (Currently has air break.) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

The floors in the retail area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
